target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit Snowflake-only clauses, warehouse settings, or session semantics.

unsupported_object_types.trigger: Snowflake trigger migration is not supported because Snowflake sources do not provide trigger objects in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.event: Snowflake event migration is not supported by this tool.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for SQL Server in this tool.

table: Convert Snowflake table syntax to valid SQL Server DDL with compatible data types and defaults.
storedprocedure: Convert Snowflake procedure syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE PROCEDURE syntax.
function: Convert Snowflake function syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE FUNCTION syntax.
sequence: Convert Snowflake sequences to valid SQL Server CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
synonym: Convert Snowflake synonym-like indirection only when it can be represented as a valid SQL Server synonym.
